messages.content: edit in a form of a title of a paper: What incentives are matter? An assessment of affecting factors on patients’ continuous use of Digital therapeutics: A cross-country study in Canada and Germany
"Incentives that Matter: Factors Affecting Patients' Continued Use of Digital Therapeutics in Canada and Germany – A Cross-Country Study"
start wit a question
What is the impact of social media on mental health?

Why the current incentives are not enough
Why are the current incentives insufficient?

incentives of Patients’ Continued Use of Digital Therapeutics in Canada and Germany

edit: Are Digital Therapeutics incentives on the right track? A Cross-Country Vignette Study of Incentives for Patients’ Continued Use of Digital Therapeutics in Canada and Germany
"Are Digital Therapeutics Incentives on the Right Track? A Cross-Country Vignette Study of Incentives for Patients’ Continued Use of Digital Therapeutics in Canada and Germany"
edit again?
"Assessing the Effectiveness of Digital Therapeutics Incentives: A Cross-Country Vignette Study of Patients’ Continued Use in Canada and Germany"

edit: We plan to design and conduct an online experiment and recruit participants from Canada and Germany. While the experimental method has a long and successful tradition in social research, online experiments combine the advantages of lab experiments (e.g., control of variables) with online survey administration methods that allow hypothesis testing with larger numbers of subjects (Reips, 2002; Dandurand et al. 2008).
"Our Proposed Online Experiment to Assess Digital Therapeutics Incentives: Recruiting Participants from Canada and Germany. Combining the Best of Both Worlds of Lab and Online research methods."
